response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the first verse of 'Gatchaman no Uta' and 'Kinnikuman Go Fight!' provided in the Reference JSON. However, the video extends beyond the JSON reference, including all three verses of 'Gatchaman no Uta' and parts of the second verse of 'Kinnikuman Go Fight!'. I have transcribed these additional sections using audio as the ground truth. Timing is strictly synchronized to the vocal waveform, with instrumental bridges and transitions left silent. On-screen song titles are prioritized during instrumental intros when lyrics are not present.
